I’m carefully considering impacts on nullable types and ensuring no lingering references remain before deleting obsolete files. Let’s explore this step-by-step!

1→package app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.ui.contribution
 2→
 3→import android.content.Intent
 4→import android.net.Uri
 5→import androidx.activity.compose.BackHandler
 6→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
 7→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 8→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
 9→import androidx.compose.ui.res.stringResource
10→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
11→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.mvi.observe
12→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.organism.TopAppBarWithBackButton
13→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.template.Scaffold
14→import app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.R
15→import app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.ui.contribution.ContributionContract.ViewModel
16→import org.koin.androidx.compose.koinViewModel
17→
18→@Composable
19→internal fun ContributionScreen(
20→    onBack: () -> Unit,
21→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
22→    viewModel: ViewModel = koinViewModel<ContributionViewModel>(),
23→) {
24→    val activity = LocalActivity.current
25→    val context = LocalContext.current
26→
27→    val (state, dispatch) = viewModel.observe { effect ->
28→        when (effect) {
29→            is ContributionContract.Effect.ManageSubscription -> {
30→                context.startActivity(
31→                    getManageSubscriptionIntent(
32→                        productId = effect.productId,
33→                        packageName = context.packageName,
34→                    ),
35→                )
36→            }
37→
38→            is ContributionContract.Effect.PurchaseContribution -> {
39→                effect.startPurchaseFlow(activity)
40→            }
41→        }
42→    }
43→
44→    BackHandler {
45→        onBack()
46→    }
47→
48→    Scaffold(
49→        modifier = modifier,
50→        topBar = {
51→            TopAppBarWithBackButton(
52→                title = stringResource(R.string.funding_googleplay_contribution_title),
53→                onBackClick = onBack,
54→            )
55→        },
56→    ) { innerPadding ->
57→        ContributionContent(
58→            state = state.value,
59→            onEvent = { dispatch(it) },
60→            contentPadding = innerPadding,
61→        )
62→    }
63→}
64→
65→private const val SUBSCRIPTION_URL = "https://play.google.com/store/account/subscriptions"
66→
67→private fun getManageSubscriptionIntent(
68→    productId: String,
69→    packageName: String,
70→): Intent {
71→    val uri = Uri.parse(SUBSCRIPTION_URL)
72→        .buildUpon()
73→        .appendQueryParameter("sku", productId)
74→        .appendQueryParameter("package", packageName)
75→        .build()
76→
77→    return Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, uri)
78→}

1→package app.k9mail.feature.account.server.settings.ui.common
  2→
  3→import android.view.WindowManager
  4→import androidx.biometric.BiometricManager
  5→import androidx.biometric.BiometricPrompt
  6→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
  7→import androidx.compose.runtime.DisposableEffect
  8→import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
  9→import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
 10→import androidx.compose.runtime.saveable.rememberSaveable
 11→import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
 12→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 13→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
 14→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
 15→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.atom.textfield.TextFieldOutlinedPassword
 16→
 17→/**
 18→ * Variant of [TextFieldOutlinedPassword] that only allows the password to be unmasked after the user has authenticated
 19→ * using [BiometricPrompt].
 20→ *
 21→ * Note: Due to limitations of [BiometricPrompt] this composable can only be used inside a [FragmentActivity].
 22→ */
 23→@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 24→@Composable
 25→fun TextFieldOutlinedPasswordBiometric(
 26→    value: String,
 27→    onValueChange: (String) -> Unit,
 28→    authenticationTitle: String,
 29→    authenticationSubtitle: String,
 30→    needScreenLockMessage: String,
 31→    onWarningChange: (CharSequence?) -> Unit,
 32→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
 33→    label: String? = null,
 34→    isEnabled: Boolean = true,
 35→    isReadOnly: Boolean = false,
 36→    isRequired: Boolean = false,
 37→    hasError: Boolean = false,
 38→) {
 39→    var isPasswordVisible by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
 40→    var isAuthenticated by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
 41→    var isAuthenticationRequired by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(true) }
 42→
 43→    // If the entire password was removed, we allow the user to unmask the text field without requiring authentication.
 44→    if (value.isEmpty()) {
 45→        isAuthenticationRequired = false
 46→    }
 47→
 48→    val activity = LocalActivity.current as FragmentActivity
 49→
 50→    TextFieldOutlinedPassword(
 51→        value = value,
 52→        onValueChange = onValueChange,
 53→        modifier = modifier,
 54→        label = label,
 55→        isEnabled = isEnabled,
 56→        isReadOnly = isReadOnly,
 57→        isRequired = isRequired,
 58→        hasError = hasError,
 59→        isPasswordVisible = isPasswordVisible,
 60→        onPasswordVisibilityToggleClicked = {
 61→            if (!isAuthenticationRequired || isAuthenticated) {
 62→                isPasswordVisible = !isPasswordVisible
 63→                activity.setSecure(isPasswordVisible)
 64→            } else {
 65→                showBiometricPrompt(
 66→                    activity,
 67→                    authenticationTitle,
 68→                    authenticationSubtitle,
 69→                    needScreenLockMessage,
 70→                    onAuthSuccess = {
 71→                        isAuthenticated = true
 72→                        isPasswordVisible = true
 73→                        onWarningChange(null)
 74→                        activity.setSecure(true)
 75→                    },
 76→                    onAuthError = onWarningChange,
 77→                )
 78→            }
 79→        },
 80→    )
 81→
 82→    DisposableEffect(key1 = "secureWindow") {
 83→        activity.setSecure(isPasswordVisible)
 84→
 85→        onDispose {
 86→            activity.setSecure(false)
 87→        }
 88→    }
 89→}
 90→
 91→private fun showBiometricPrompt(
 92→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 93→    title: String,
 94→    subtitle: String,
 95→    needScreenLockMessage: String,
 96→    onAuthSuccess: () -> Unit,
 97→    onAuthError: (CharSequence) -> Unit,
 98→) {
 99→    val authenticationCallback = object : BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationCallback() {
100→        override fun onAuthenticationSucceeded(result: BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationResult) {
101→            onAuthSuccess()
102→        }
103→
104→        override fun onAuthenticationError(errorCode: Int, errString: CharSequence) {
105→            if (errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_HW_NOT_PRESENT ||
106→                errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_NO_DEVICE_CREDENTIAL ||
107→                errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_NO_BIOMETRICS
108→            ) {
109→                onAuthError(needScreenLockMessage)
110→            } else if (errString.isNotEmpty()) {
111→                onAuthError(errString)
112→            }
113→        }
114→    }
115→
116→    val promptInfo = BiometricPrompt.PromptInfo.Builder()
117→        .setAllowedAuthenticators(
118→            BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_STRONG or
119→                BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_WEAK or
120→                BiometricManager.Authenticators.DEVICE_CREDENTIAL,
121→        )
122→        .setTitle(title)
123→        .setSubtitle(subtitle)
124→        .build()
125→
126→    BiometricPrompt(activity, authenticationCallback).authenticate(promptInfo)
127→}
128→
129→private fun FragmentActivity.setSecure(secure: Boolean) {
130→    window.setFlags(if (secure) WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SECURE else 0, WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SECURE)
131→}

Summary:
- Bumped the shared `androidxActivity` version to 1.10.1 in the version catalog and refreshed every dependency guard runtime classpath snapshot so they reflect the new `activity`, `activity-ktx`, and `activity-compose` artifacts.
- Removed the custom `LocalActivity`/`setActivityContent` helper and updated all callers to rely on the official `androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity` and `ComponentActivity.setContent`.
- Added the missing `androidx.activity.compose` dependency to every library module that now imports `LocalActivity` or `setContent`, and adjusted the affected Kotlin sources (including tests) to use the new imports.

Testing:
- `read_lints` on all touched Kotlin/build files plus `gradle/libs.versions.toml` (no issues reported).

11→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.mvi.observe
12→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.organism.TopAppBarWithBackButton
13→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.template.Scaffold
14→import app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.R
15→import app.k9mail.feature.funding.googleplay.ui.contribution.ContributionContract.ViewModel
16→import org.koin.androidx.compose.koinViewModel
17→
18→@Composable
19→internal fun ContributionScreen(
20→    onBack: () -> Unit,
21→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
22→    viewModel: ViewModel = koinViewModel<ContributionViewModel>(),
23→) {
24→    val activity = LocalActivity.current
25→    val context = LocalContext.current
26→
27→    val (state, dispatch) = viewModel.observe { effect ->
28→        when (effect) {
29→            is ContributionContract.Effect.ManageSubscription -> {
30→                context.startActivity(
31→                    getManageSubscriptionIntent(
32→                        productId = effect.productId,
33→                        packageName = context.packageName,
34→                    ),
35→                )
36→            }
37→
38→            is ContributionContract.Effect.PurchaseContribution -> {
39→                effect.startPurchaseFlow(activity)
40→            }
41→        }
42→    }
43→
44→    BackHandler {
45→        onBack()
46→    }
47→
48→    Scaffold(
49→        modifier = modifier,
50→        topBar = {
51→            TopAppBarWithBackButton(
52→                title = stringResource(R.string.funding_googleplay_contribution_title),
53→                onBackClick = onBack,
54→            )
55→        },
56→    ) { innerPadding ->
57→        ContributionContent(
58→            state = state.value,
59→            onEvent = { dispatch(it) },
60→            contentPadding = innerPadding,
61→        )
62→    }
63→}
64→
65→private const val SUBSCRIPTION_URL = "https://play.google.com/store/account/subscriptions"
66→
67→private fun getManageSubscriptionIntent(
68→    productId: String,
69→    packageName: String,
70→): Intent {
71→    val uri = Uri.parse(SUBSCRIPTION_URL)
72→        .buildUpon()
73→        .appendQueryParameter("sku", productId)
74→        .appendQueryParameter("package", packageName)
75→        .build()
76→
77→    return Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, uri)
78→}
79→

  3→import android.view.WindowManager
  4→import androidx.biometric.BiometricManager
  5→import androidx.biometric.BiometricPrompt
  6→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
  7→import androidx.compose.runtime.DisposableEffect
  8→import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
  9→import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
 10→import androidx.compose.runtime.saveable.rememberSaveable
 11→import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
 12→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 13→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
 14→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
 15→import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.atom.textfield.TextFieldOutlinedPassword
 16→
 17→/**
 18→ * Variant of [TextFieldOutlinedPassword] that only allows the password to be unmasked after the user has authenticated
 19→ * using [BiometricPrompt].
 20→ *
 21→ * Note: Due to limitations of [BiometricPrompt] this composable can only be used inside a [FragmentActivity].
 22→ */
 23→@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 24→@Composable
 25→fun TextFieldOutlinedPasswordBiometric(
 26→    value: String,
 27→    onValueChange: (String) -> Unit,
 28→    authenticationTitle: String,
 29→    authenticationSubtitle: String,
 30→    needScreenLockMessage: String,
 31→    onWarningChange: (CharSequence?) -> Unit,
 32→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
 33→    label: String? = null,
 34→    isEnabled: Boolean = true,
 35→    isReadOnly: Boolean = false,
 36→    isRequired: Boolean = false,
 37→    hasError: Boolean = false,
 38→) {
 39→    var isPasswordVisible by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
 40→    var isAuthenticated by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
 41→    var isAuthenticationRequired by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(true) }
 42→
 43→    // If the entire password was removed, we allow the user to unmask the text field without requiring authentication.
 44→    if (value.isEmpty()) {
 45→        isAuthenticationRequired = false
 46→    }
 47→
 48→    val activity = LocalActivity.current as FragmentActivity
 49→
 50→    TextFieldOutlinedPassword(
 51→        value = value,
 52→        onValueChange = onValueChange,
 53→        modifier = modifier,
 54→        label = label,
 55→        isEnabled = isEnabled,
 56→        isReadOnly = isReadOnly,
 57→        isRequired = isRequired,
 58→        hasError = hasError,
 59→        isPasswordVisible = isPasswordVisible,
 60→        onPasswordVisibilityToggleClicked = {
 61→            if (!isAuthenticationRequired || isAuthenticated) {
 62→                isPasswordVisible = !isPasswordVisible
 63→                activity.setSecure(isPasswordVisible)
 64→            } else {
 65→                showBiometricPrompt(
 66→                    activity,
 67→                    authenticationTitle,
 68→                    authenticationSubtitle,
 69→                    needScreenLockMessage,
 70→                    onAuthSuccess = {
 71→                        isAuthenticated = true
 72→                        isPasswordVisible = true
 73→                        onWarningChange(null)
 74→                        activity.setSecure(true)
 75→                    },
 76→                    onAuthError = onWarningChange,
 77→                )
 78→            }
 79→        },
 80→    )
 81→
 82→    DisposableEffect(key1 = "secureWindow") {
 83→        activity.setSecure(isPasswordVisible)
 84→
 85→        onDispose {
 86→            activity.setSecure(false)
 87→        }
 88→    }
 89→}
 90→
 91→private fun showBiometricPrompt(
 92→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 93→    title: String,
 94→    subtitle: String,
 95→    needScreenLockMessage: String,
 96→    onAuthSuccess: () -> Unit,
 97→    onAuthError: (CharSequence) -> Unit,
 98→) {
 99→    val authenticationCallback = object : BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationCallback() {
100→        override fun onAuthenticationSucceeded(result: BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationResult) {
101→            onAuthSuccess()
102→        }
103→
104→        override fun onAuthenticationError(errorCode: Int, errString: CharSequence) {
105→            if (errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_HW_NOT_PRESENT ||
106→                errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_NO_DEVICE_CREDENTIAL ||
107→                errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_NO_BIOMETRICS
108→            ) {
109→                onAuthError(needScreenLockMessage)
110→            } else if (errString.isNotEmpty()) {
111→                onAuthError(errString)
112→            }
113→        }
114→    }
115→
116→    val promptInfo = BiometricPrompt.PromptInfo.Builder()
117→        .setAllowedAuthenticators(
118→            BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_STRONG or
119→                BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_WEAK or
120→                BiometricManager.Authenticators.DEVICE_CREDENTIAL,
